feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to activate Trading partner Agreement with MIG using custom message
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I created a MIG with a custom X12 structure. When I tried to use this in trading partner agreement and activate it , I am getting the below error.

Error was : Failed to publish Message Implementation Guideline with id 4b6dd29d12024347b1d9b875c1c2b345 to Partner Directory. Error was : Error executing [PUSH_TO_PD] on service [SAP Integration Advisor]. Response was [Code: 500, Reason : Internal Server Error : {"errorCode":"FAILED_TO_PUSH_ARTIFACT_TO_CPI","errorMessage":"Cannot invoke \"com.sap.it.spc.smarti.ica.exporter.util.ArtifactHolder.getContent()\" because \"msgXsd\" is null"}]

Can anyone please help ?

entry.title: Overall timeout/deadline for CPI iflow
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a requirement to set an overall timeout or deadline for an integration flow that it is expected to run for a long time until a required entry is found in a datastore. The entry is expected at certain time of the day but it can be delayed for several reasons. If the deadline is reached, the processing has to stop and the message has to end in error.

Has anyone faced a similar challenge? If so, how can this be achieved?

I searched thoughout the community but haven't found anything useful. Maybe my searching criteria was poor.

I thought about encapsulating the main functionality in a looping local process, with a groovy that waits a little time, lets say 30 seconds, before let a datastore-get, look for the entry; then set the looping process max iterations dynamically with a property that has the calculation 'deadline-time-in-seconds' divided by 'waiting-time-by-the-groovy' (for example, if the dealine is 1 hour, then the property would be 3600/30 = 120 iterations) and let the loop end in error if the max iterations is reached. The condition expression would be initially false and switched to true if the entry is found in the datastore. Would this be okay?

 

Thanks in advance for any insight on this matter.

Thanks

entry.title: How to Handle Missing Source Values and Default to Empty String in SAP CPI Mapping?
entry.content:
I’m working on an integration in SAP CPI where I need to handle missing or null values in the mapping. Specifically, I want to ensure that when there is no value for a specific source field, the target JSON payload includes "value": "". (see attached picture for current mapping). 

Original Problem:

We are encountering the following error in the flow:

"Error occurred during custom_attributes processing. The responsibilities_employee attribute code doesn't have a value set. Enter the value and try again."

The current payload looks like this:
{
"attribute_code": "responsibilities_employee"
} 

The requirement is that when there is no value for the attribute (e.g., responsibilities_employee), we need the output to include:

{
"attribute_code": "responsibilities_employee",
"value": ""
} 

I have tried the following:

  1. I used the exists function to check if the input field exists.
  2. I connected it to an ifS function to return either the source value (if it exists) or "" (empty string) if it does not.
  3. I passed this output to a concat function to join the values (GivenName and FamilyName), with a space as a delimiter.

Here’s the simplified flow I’ve been building:

  • GivenName → ifS → concat
  • FamilyName → ifS → concat
  • concat → value

However, it’s still not working as expected, and when the source value is missing, the value tag is missing entirely in the output payload instead of defaulting to "".

How can adjust the mapping in order for it to work?

For the sake of clarity. When the field is populated it looks like this:
{
"attribute_code": "responsibilities_employee",
"value": "John Doe"
},

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration Cloud Foundry: Integration Content API not available
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I hope all of you are doing well.

I have stumbled across the Integration Content API for SAP Cloud Integration, and it looks really promising:

https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/overview

I have tried to access this API from my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant, which is running as part of Integration Suite on Cloud Foundry. For the record I have not enabled SAP API Management, but according to most of the blogs I have read it does not seem to me that it is required. 

When I try to call the API endpoint just to see if I can reach it, I receive an HTTP 404 - Not Found. The URL I tried is:
https://<sub account name>.integrationsuite.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/IntegrationPackages

I have also used the following URL, and this gives me an Odata response with a bunch of Entity Sets, but the entity sets related to SAP Cloud Integration are not listed (for example the IntegrationPackages entity set is not there).

https://<sub account name>.integrationsuite.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1

I have gone through countless amounts of SAP blogs and SAP Help documents, and they all highlight that the API should just be available for SAP Cloud Integration with no instructions to enable the integration content to be made available. This makes me think that I have the incorrect DNS\host name in the API URL I am trying to call.

So, to my question: Do I need to do anything specific to enable this Integration Content API for my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant?

If yes, will someone please be so kind to provide me with instructions on what is required?

If no, will someone please explain to me what is the correct URL I should use to access this API for my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant?

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Use Of Key value map associated in API Proxy
entry.content:
Hi, 

Do you know what is the use of this section in the API proxy? I am using some Key value maps in the policy and I dont see any info under Key value map assocaited in the API proxy page

Were you able to see some entries ? How to bring the entries here when API proxy is using key value map?

 

Regards,

Muni

entry.title: Data connection between Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 and SAP IBP
entry.content:
Dear community,

is it possible to connect SAP IBP via CI-DS to an AZURE Data Lage Storage Gen2? Or would it make yet another integration / middleware platform necessary?

Any practical experience with transferring data between ADLS Gen2 and SAP IBP?

BR, Peter

entry.title: how can we change global uuid to customer value in IAS user store
entry.content:
We are trying to use our own customer ID for the global uuid within the IAS user record in the Identity Directory as described in this SAP doc: Global User ID in Integration Scenarios | SAP Help Portal. 

In our solution, users are provisioned via IPS from SuccessFactors and we want this to include a customer value for the global uuid, but the updates we have made to the transformations for the IPS SCIM API read of SuccessFactors as source (IAS as target) as described in the document have not worked.

Has anyone successfully deployed their own customer value into global uuid in IAS in this way who has any insight?

entry.title: FATAL: too many connections for database while accessing Templates or Agreements in TPM
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am getting FATAL: too many connections for database  while accessing templates or Agreements under B2B Scenarios in Trading Partner Management.

May I know, how to resolve this ?

entry.title: Connecting Event Mesh from Cloud Foundry subaccount to CPI(Cloud Integration) in Neo subaccount
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For our customer, we have SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) in Neo environment and SAP Event Mesh will be in Cloud Foundry Subaccount. Both are in different Global Account.

Could you please let us know whether we can be able to connect seamlessly between two environment (CF and Neo) to integrate SAP CPI and Event Mesh in customer landscape for  Event Driven Integration.

I would like to know the feasibility of this kind of setup and whether there will be any challenges or not?

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Monitoring Storage optimal usage
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 
We are currently using the SAP Integration Suite within our organization, and it is shared among several teams. We are facing challenges with monitoring storage utilization, especially since one team might use more storage than others. The maximum allowed monitoring storage is 35,000 MB. We are also implementing pipeline concepts, which result in 3 or more messages for a single message transfer from sender to receiver.
 
Could you please provide guidance on the following:
1)How can we utilize the monitoring storage wisely and enforce best practices across all teams?
2)What are the potential risks and worst-case scenarios if we exceed the maximum allowed monitoring storage?
3)What strategies can we implement to avoid these risks, especially considering our use of pipeline concepts that generate multiple messages?
We appreciate any insights or recommendations you can offer to help us manage our monitoring storage effectively.
 

Thanks

Ramu.

entry.title: CPI | MPL Logs | Circuit Breaker mechanism
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are observing that our MPL are not coming up, after seeing SAP notes it seems we are hitting our quota.

Can you advice how to find out which iflow is generating maximum logs, do we have some API or other steps via which we can find out which iFlow is generating so much logs each day.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2593825

  1. Explanation about Circuit Breaker mechanism
    • The threshold for Circuit Breaker is capped to 1GB of MPL attachments per 24 hours.
    • Once Circuit Breaker is activated, no more MPL attachments will be persisted.

Thanks

Yatan

entry.title: Sharing headers and exchange properties among parallel multicast branches in BTP IS (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a scenario in which I need 2 branches from a parallel multicast, the first one have to control the execution time and the other executes the normal flow of the integration.

What I'm trying to accomplish doesn't work because each branch of the parallel multicast gets its own set of headers and exchange properties and modifying them in one branch doesn't take place in the other, also new headers and properties created in one branch are not present in the other. I don't know if this a bug or if it is intended, I guess my question is:

Is there a way to share headers and exchange properties among parallel multicast branches, without writing global variables or resorting to save data in data stores or JMS queues?

I tried changing the runtime configuration allowing headers and combining these allowed headers with all the possible options in HTTP Session Reuse, didn't work.

Thanks.

entry.title: Different structure of WSDL in test and Production for integration in massage mapping
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We have different WSDL structure for our integration in test and production. Difference is mostly related to the system IDs in test and production.

 

We have manually refreshed the WSDL in production system however in future it will be problematic i.e. whenever we make any changes in test and migrate to production ( download from test and upload into prod ) WSDL will get refreshed from the test.

 

And each time , we must update the WSDL structure in prod system manually which we don’t want to do.  

 

 Does anyone have idea how to manage migration of integration when WSDL is different between test and production ?

 

Thanks.

Sachin Yadav

entry.title: Apache Kafka Connection from BTP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement to connect to Apache Kafka from BTP Integration Suite and then transform those XML messages and push them to SAP Backend systems. Could you please let me know if there are any pre-requisites needed to connect to Apache Kafka using Integration Suite. I knew that there is a standard Kafka adapter to connect to Apache Kafka but still any important points to consider before building interface on SAP Integration Suite? We mainly need support to connect to Apache Kafka .. What details should we ask Apache Kafka to share? Should we use connect to Apache Kafka using cloud Connector? Any settings needed to done on Apache Kafka side also? Also should we raise Firewall clearance?

Thanks

Ramu.

entry.title: Unable to Create Event Consumption Model in On-premise system.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm trying to create an event consumption model by following the steps from the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-event-processing-s4h-onpremise..html

and getting the below error. Could you please help me on resolving this error?

Regards,

Ramesh

entry.title: Groovy Script dynamic time calculation - Error "No such property"
entry.content:
Hi .. We have a requirement to dynamically substract minutes/hours from current time. 

Here is sample Groovy script, working fine in Groovy compiler. but in SAP Iflow, getting error saying that 

"No such property: minutes for class: java.lang.String"

 

import groovy.time.TimeCategory
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat

DateTo = new Date()

use( groovy.time.TimeCategory ) {
def value = 200
DateFrom = DateTo - value.minutes
}

 

 

Could you please help.

Thank you.

entry.title: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_Data_And_Org_Query failed
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

we're experiencing failures to below services in test and prod tenants since Jan 11, 2025, 05:52:04 

 

  • Replicate Organizational Objects from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA
  • Replicate Employee Master Data and Org. Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA

Error Text :  Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_Data_And_Org_Query_S4D failed with message "IllegalStateException:The request object has been recycled and is no longer associated with this facade"

entry.title: CIS (Cloud Identity Services) - IAS & IPS
entry.content: New to CIS (Cloud Identity Services). My understanding is that both IAS (Identity Authentication Service) and IPS (Identity Provisioning Service) are available in CIS. Is it possible to use only the IPS portion of CIS or do you have to make use of both IPS and IAS (for authentication) when using CIS?

entry.title: Interface from MQ to SAP ECC (webservices) via BTP IS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to build interface from MQ to SAP ECC (webservices) using SAP Integration (Cloud Integration). Could you please let me know what should be receiver adapter that should be used to post the data to SAP ECC using webservices URL? Also if someone has already worked on how would be the sample URL look like? because I would need those info to raise FW request, Cloud connector entries .. I mean https://<<host>>:<<port>> ... I mainly interested on port info (is it 8080 or something else) and this would help me before we start developing artifacts..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Error in standard tpm iflow after 2.4.1 update
entry.content:
Hi All,

Recently I have updated the Trading Partner Management package to 2.4.1 version. Now I'm facing an error in Step 1b iflow of standard package while processing the inbound and outbound messages. 

I'm getting the following error in step 1b iflow:

org.apache.camel.ResolveEndpointFailedException: Failed to resolve endpoint: xslt://?output=bytes&saxon=true&saxonExtensionFunctions=%23xsltExtensionsV11&transformerFactory=%23saxoneeTransformer&uriResolverFactory=%23xsltUriResolverFactory due to: Path of the XSLT Mapping is empty, cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Path of the XSLT Mapping is empty

 

Can anyone provide me a solution for this issue?

Thanks,

Aditya
